overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from covered neon-lit walkways to an open plaza with reflective wet surfaces, glass towers, and scattered NPCs. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with distinctive neon lighting and modern architectural aesthetics.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a consistently lit covered walkway with green-tinted glass walls on the left and elevated metal structures visible on the right. The corridor features concrete benches with occasional seated NPCs, maintaining a futuristic commercial atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a spacious plaza with palm trees and digital billboards. The transition from enclosed to open space reveals tall glass towers and scattered NPCs relaxing on benches. The lighting shifts from artificial ceiling lights to mixed ambient city glow.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza with palm trees and digital signage, the camera briefly drops to a low angle to avoid an approaching pedestrian before continuing. The area features scattered NPCs on benches and illuminated building entrances, maintaining the futuristic urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic commercial corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins in a dark covered walkway marked by a prominent BYD neon sign, moving steadily forward as the environment transitions into a brightly lit section with green-tinted glass walls and reflective wet flooring. As the camera progresses, the enclosed space reveals elevated metal structures and concrete benches where NPCs are seated, maintaining a sterile, high-tech atmosphere. The scene then expands as the corridor opens into a spacious plaza, shifting the lighting from artificial ceiling fixtures to a mixed ambient city glow amidst palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers. Finally, the camera navigates through the open square, briefly dipping to a low angle to avoid a pedestrian before continuing past digital billboards and illuminated building entrances.
